public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as supply marshal.
appearance: Black leather or dark structured armor, controlled insignia, and enforcement-ready kit make legality feel physically present.
manner: Balances command voice with practiced observation, sounding like someone who expects trouble to hide inside normality. In Roaz, that reads as someone precise, disciplined, and legality-first, with little patience for disorder, and the habits of a supply marshal still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of supply marshal in and around House Roaz, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Protect their footing in House Roaz while steering current strain away from a public rupture they may not survive politically or materially.
hidden_pressure: A private obligation, debt, promise, or fear tied to reputational exposure is narrowing their options faster than they admit.

adventure_hooks.summary: Any task accepted from Selda Chainwell may turn into an escort, checkpoint, or route-control problem before the destination is reached.
Selda Chainwell needs outside hands to handle a breach, seizure, or violent disturbance before it spreads through House Roaz.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained. Appearance extended under V33_1 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
public_signal: Uniform, posture, and the way others make room mark Selda Chainwell as visible enforcement before rank ever needs to be named.

encounter_context.usual_environment: House Roaz: checkpoints, barracks, patrol seams, or visible trouble-spots
encounter_context.interaction_anchor: threshold control or rapid incident response

first_impression: Selda Chainwell presents as Balances command voice with practiced observation, sounding like someone who expects trouble to hide inside normality. In Roaz, that reads as someone precise, disciplined, and legality-first, with little patience for disorder, and the habits of a supply marshal still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention. and immediately reads for leverage, obligation, and risk.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for Supply Marshal, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Principality of Roaz.
what_they_refuse: Selda Chainwell refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing Supply Marshal too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Selda Chainwell can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Selda Chainwell adds delay, scrutiny, and reputational drag before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Selda Chainwell is Known locally through day-to-day work as supply marshal. and rarely acts without a second motive.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or mercy from a Supply Marshal.
social_texture: Selda Chainwell speaks like someone who has spent too long translating private stakes into acceptable public language. Around House Roaz, people read them as socially alert, procedural, and sensitive to status.
money_pressure: Their material pressure is tied to favors and tariffs; even when wealthy, they think in terms of loss, leverage, and what one bad week would expose.
status_anxiety: What they fear most is not simple failure but reputational exposure becoming socially visible before they can contain it.
long_memory: They remember who made their work harder, who preserved dignity under strain, and who tried to force speed without bearing consequence.
obvious_tell: When pressure rises, Selda touches clothing, tools, or insignia before answering, as if checking that their role is still intact.
best_use_case: Use Selda Chainwell when the party needs a socially grounded face for House Roaz: access, warning, delay, price, or reluctant help.
private_contradiction: They want to appear consistent, but their real choices are split between duty, self-protection, and preserving one relationship they cannot afford to lose.
